steps.t: Speak with Doorward Azagâya outside the Shorakhúna in Zajâna about rumours concerning Bârshud and his whereabouts.
Speak with Muzâwi at the Court of Larinâsta in Zajâna.
Collect herbs and defeat rats in the farming district of Zajâna.
Return to Muzâwi in the Court of Larinâsta with the herbs and report your success.
Return to speak with Mizâdi outside the Shorakhúna in Zajâna with Muzâwi's report.
